research.title: Research Discovery
research.subtitle: Discover and synthesise academic literature from Semantic Scholar and CrossRef
research.placeholder: Enter a research topic (e.g. machine learning in Malaysian education)
research.noResults: No papers found. Try a broader search topic.
research.step1: We search Semantic Scholar and CrossRef for real academic papers on your topic.
research.step2: An AI synthesises the literature into themes, findings, and contradictions.
research.step3: You receive a structured report with cited sources you can explore further.

chat.title: Integrity Advisor
chat.subtitle: Ask about academic integrity, AI-use policies, plagiarism rules, and citation standards
chat.placeholder: Ask about academic integrity, plagiarism, AI use, or citations...
chat.disclaimer: Responses are grounded in UAM policy documents

writing.title: Writing Support
writing.subtitle: Get structured feedback on your academic draft
writing.placeholder: Paste your introduction, discussion, or full draft for review...

sources.title: Source Organiser
sources.subtitle: Add URLs, DOIs, or paper titles — get APA 7th Edition citations instantly
sources.addPlaceholder: Paste a URL, DOI, or paper title…
sources.emptyHint: Add at least one source to get started

preview.label: APA Preview
preview.hint: Final citation will be generated after organising

grant.title: Grant Proposal Checker
grant.subtitle: Evaluate your FRGS proposal against the four key scoring criteria
grant.placeholder: Paste your grant proposal text here (minimum 50 words, maximum 3000 words)...
grant.loadingHint: This may take up to 30 seconds for a thorough review
grant.qualityHint: Based on key terms and content signals — increases as you elaborate

significance.title: Research Significance
significance.desc: How well does the proposal justify why this research matters and what gap it addresses?

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Does the proposal offer a novel approach, method, or perspective beyond existing work?

methodology.title: Methodology Clarity
methodology.desc: Are the research design, data collection, and analysis steps clearly defined and appropriate?

impact.title: Impact & Outcomes
impact.desc: Are the expected outcomes, societal benefits, and knowledge contributions clearly stated?

register.name: Full name
